task-1774586300280-47495.title: per agent runners
task-1774586300280-47495.description: Support runtime selection per-agent (e.g. one agent runs on Claude, another on Ollama). Inject IEnumerable<IAgentExecutor> into AgentRunnerService and select the executor by matching executor.Name against a field in agent.json.

task-1774599048399-c0d80.title: Journal view agent names
task-1774599048399-c0d80.description: Adjust the agent name selector to include their role too. This needs to look like other places the agents appear. Users probably won't know the agents by name.

task-1774602438641-79795.title: Codebase missing git actions
task-1774602438641-79795.description: The next.js version would show commits, not sure if it was real. But I need this version to show the commits for the project and the commit details.

task-1774607573271-bc48a.title: Message items full view
task-1774607573271-bc48a.description: Enhance the Messages page to show a dialog that will display the fully formatted message.  There must be a markdown viewer we can use to show the message in full.

task-1774614038362-b3aae.title: new project dialog - agent selection
task-1774614038362-b3aae.description: When the dialog is shown can we default all the agents to selected.
